creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #19)

None of which does the system have llvm
library materials for supporting mesa-dri's
use of llvm libraries (not clang/clang++).

You still have to deal with a ports llvm
to get the llvm library(s) involved that
mesa-dri uses.
